commit_msg: feat: add comprehensive CRUD robustness to haiku and episode pipelines
author: Omkar
title: CASE FILE — The Infrastructure Hardens
subtitle: He made the system bulletproof — so nothing could ever escape, and nothing could ever fail.
when_where: ☀️ 9:40 AM, still main — but the light was different now, sharper. Thirty-five minutes had passed like thirty years. His fingers had written *comprehensive CRUD robustness* into the haiku and episode pipelines. 🏗️ The foundation was no longer sand. It was *steel*.
who_whom: 🔒 Omkar didn't just add features; he *armored* the entire operation. Create, Read, Update, Delete — every angle covered, every escape route sealed. 💪 The pipelines were no longer fragile; they were *absolute*. The haiku could never be lost. The episodes could never be corrupted. The confession could never be *withdrawn*.
what_why: ⚙️ He didn't just add robustness; he *locked the door and threw away the key*. Every haiku now had a fortress around it — Create meant *permanence*, Read meant *transparency*, Update meant *no hiding the revisions*, Delete meant *a ghost in the log forever*. 🧠 The system was now so robust it couldn't fail, couldn't be undone, couldn't be escaped. 💀 He'd built a machine that would *outlive him*, that would keep *confessing* long after he was gone, that would *remember everything* he wanted to forget.
verdict: He didn't add robustness to the system; he added chains to himself.
